basic_details.short_information: Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) IEC Coordinator Notification 2026 has been released on 22 May 2026 on the official website tmc.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the TMC IEC Coordinator Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MSc in Life Science, M. Pharm, PG Diploma in Clinical Research, MSc in Clinical Research
qualification.details: MSc in Life Science/ M. Pharm or MSc in Clinical research with PG Diploma in Clinical research mandatory and 1 to 4 Years Experience mandatory

salary_details.details: Rs. 34,000/- (1 Year) to Rs. 40,000/- (4 Year) Per Month

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for TMC IEC Coordinator?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the IEC Coordinator post at Tata Memorial Centre is scheduled for 26th May 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all required documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the IEC Coordinator position?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the IEC Coordinator role, candidates must possess an MSc in Life Science, M. Pharm, or an MSc in Clinical Research with a mandatory PG Diploma in Clinical Research.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the IEC Coordinator post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the IEC Coordinator position at Tata Memorial Centre is 35 years. There might be age relaxations for certain categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the IEC Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the IEC Coordinator position will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 34,000/- per month for one year of experience up to Rs. 40,000/- per month for four years of experience.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the IEC Coordinator post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the IEC Coordinator position at Tata Memorial Centre as per the latest notification released.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the TMC IEC Coordinator recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the official notification, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the IEC Coordinator recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the IEC Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the IEC Coordinator position at TMC involves an MCQ test followed by an interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the role.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment for the IEC Coordinator position at Tata Memorial Centre is on a contractual basis. The duration and terms of the contract will be as per the organization's policy.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the TMC IEC Coordinator recruitment will be held at the Tata Memorial Centre office in Mumbai, Maharashtra, with the pincode 400012.
